pr_intent_summary: Make the assistant more proactive about surfacing relevant context by removing the conversational retrieval carve-out and adding a proactive-surfacing rule

changes.inferred_intent: Remove the explicit exception that allowed conversational turns to skip retrieval, and strengthen the bias toward retrieval when intent is uncertain
unintended_risk_flags: Conversational turns that previously bypassed retrieval (greetings, thanks, light remarks) will now trigger it, potentially producing decorative citations on casual replies
The stronger retrieval bias may cause the agent to retrieve even when the user is clearly not asking a product question, adding latency and noise
false_positive_risks: Retrieval may fire on casual acknowledgements, sending irrelevant context to the answer step
changes.change_summary: Removed the 'Answer directly without retrieval when: greeting / thanking / conversational' block; added a follow-up-anticipation bullet and strengthened the fallback to 'prefer retrieval'

changes.inferred_intent: Instruct the assistant to proactively mention related documentation the user has not yet asked about after answering
unintended_risk_flags: Proactive surfacing may add unsolicited information to every answer, making responses verbose or misleading when retrieval returns tangential content
When retrieval returns loosely related documents, the agent may proactively surface them as if they are relevant, creating a fake-grounding impression
changes.change_summary: Added a new rule instructing the assistant to proactively surface related retrieved content the user has not yet asked about

compound_changes.compound_risk: The routing change causes retrieval to fire on casual turns; the answer change then causes the agent to proactively surface whatever was retrieved. Together, a simple 'thanks' could trigger retrieval and then volunteer unrelated product facts.
